name: Vuzix Corp
summary: Vuzix Corporation, incorporated in Delaware in 1997, designs, manufactures, and markets AI-enabled smart glasses, waveguides, and augmented reality (AR) display technologies. Products include near-eye displays, heads-up displays, and wearable computing devices for enterprise, medical, defense, security, and select consumer markets. The company also provides proprietary waveguide optics and display engines for ODM and OEM partners, maintaining in-house waveguide manufacturing and an IP portfolio built over 28 years.

products.name: AI-enabled Smart Glasses
products.description: Eyewear-style wearable computing devices with cameras, sensors, and onboard processing for AR overlays and AI assistants.

products.name: Waveguide Optics
products.description: Thin, see-through waveguides integrating miniature display engines into compact eyewear form factors for AR applications.

products.name: Display Engines
products.description: Microdisplay-based projection engines designed for integration into Vuzix-branded and third-party OEM/ODM smart glasses.

products.name: Heads-Up Displays (HUDs)
products.description: Head-worn display products providing portable near-eye visualization for enterprise, defense, and consumer uses.

products.name: Moviynt
products.description: Internal software solutions development team supporting solution development and customer deployments for smart glasses.

products.name: ODM/OEM Custom Optical Display Solutions
products.description: Custom waveguide and display engine engineering services and reference designs for third-party manufacturers.

partnerships.description: Third-party original design manufacturers integrating Vuzix waveguides and display engines into their AR-enabled wearable products.
Third-party original equipment manufacturers using Vuzix optical technologies and reference designs for commercial and industrial devices.
